# services.spacecookie

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.spacecookie`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.spacecookie.address` | `string` | Address to listen on. Must be in the `ListenStream=` syntax of {manpage}`systemd.socket(5)`. |
| `services.spacecookie.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable spacecookie. |
| `services.spacecookie.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open the necessary port in the firewall for spacecookie. |
| `services.spacecookie.package` | `package` | The spacecookie package to use. |
| `services.spacecookie.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port the gopher service should be exposed on. |
| `services.spacecookie.settings` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Settings for spacecookie. The settings set here are directly translated to the spacecookie JSON config file. See [spacecookie.json(5)](https://sternenseemann.github.io/spacecookie/spacecookie.json.5.html) for explanations of all options. |
| `services.spacecookie.settings.hostname` | `string` | The hostname the service is reachable via. Clients will use this hostname for further requests after loading the initial gopher menu. |
| `services.spacecookie.settings.log.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable logging for spacecookie. |
| `services.spacecookie.settings.log.hide-ips` | `boolean` | If enabled, spacecookie will hide personal information of users like IP addresses from log output. |
| `services.spacecookie.settings.log.hide-time` | `boolean` | If enabled, spacecookie will not print timestamps at the beginning of every log line. |
| `services.spacecookie.settings.log.level` | `one of "info", "warn", "error"` | Log level for the spacecookie service. |
| `services.spacecookie.settings.root` | `absolute path` | The directory spacecookie should serve via gopher. Files in there need to be world-readable since the spacecookie service file sets `DynamicUser=true`. |
